title: Internship guides, supervisors & feedback
oneLiner: Voice-guided tour for use case: Internship guides, supervisors & feedback

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Auto voice tour begins — no blue-tag clicks needed.

steps.label: Prerequisite — selected intern on record
steps.observe: Requires at least one internship application in Selected or In progress. If lists are empty, run qa/runners/batch/run_internship_apply_auto_voice.bat or the full internship E2E through Select first.

steps.label: College assigns campus guide for the intern
steps.observe: Programs and Drives → Internship guides. Find the selected student. Click Assign guide, enter faculty contact details and notes, then save.

steps.label: Open Internship guides
steps.observe: Cards list selected and in-progress interns on your campus.

steps.label: Assign campus guide — manual
steps.observe: Enter guide name, department, email, and notes for the student.

steps.label: Open Internship supervisors
steps.observe: Selected and in-progress interns for your company.

steps.label: Assign company supervisor — manual
steps.observe: Enter supervisor name, team, email, phone, and notes for the intern.

steps.label: Open Internship Progress Reviews
steps.observe: Employer feedback table; Add or Edit on a selected intern row.

steps.label: Submit employer internship progress review — manual
steps.observe: Optional star rating plus at least ten characters of feedback text.

steps.label: Student opens Internship Progress Reviews
steps.observe: Campus guide and company supervisor visible when assigned. Submit student feedback below.

steps.label: Navigate to Internship Progress Reviews
steps.observe: Selected internship card with guide, supervisor, and feedback form.

steps.label: Submit student internship progress review — manual
steps.observe: Star rating optional; feedback text at least ten characters.

steps.label: College reviews internship progress review
steps.observe: Read-only table; Export CSV when rows exist.

steps.label: Open Internship Progress Reviews
steps.observe: Student and employer feedback columns for submitted rows.

steps.label: Confirm supervisor on Internship guides
steps.observe: Same intern card shows campus guide and company supervisor read-only.
